# Israeli Startup Ecosystem (Pvalyou)

> Open snapshots of the Israeli startup ecosystem, published by Pvalyou. Built from public sources and refreshed automatically. The live dashboard reads these same files.

Read SKILL.md first. It explains every file, every metric, and the operating definitions. No API key, no rate limit, just read the JSON. Files are cached on the CDN below; the raw GitHub path is the freshest.

## Guide
- [Data guide](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/pvalyou/ise-data@main/snapshot/SKILL.md): how to read every file, with the definitions
- [Index](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/pvalyou/ise-data@main/snapshot/manifest.json): machine-readable list of all files

## Data
- [Startups](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/pvalyou/ise-data@main/snapshot/startups.json): counts, funding, exits, geography
- [Founders](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/pvalyou/ise-data@main/snapshot/founders.json): founders and founding teams
- [Technologies and Patents](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/pvalyou/ise-data@main/snapshot/technology-ip.json): what startups build and patent
- [Business Models](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/pvalyou/ise-data@main/snapshot/business-models.json): revenue models and go to market
- [Open Roles](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/pvalyou/ise-data@main/snapshot/jobs.json): live hiring demand
- [Macro](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/pvalyou/ise-data@main/snapshot/macro.json): market indices and currency
- [Literature Review](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/pvalyou/ise-data@main/snapshot/literature-review.json): academic findings recomputed on Israeli data
- [About Pvalyou](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/pvalyou/ise-data@main/snapshot/about.json): company and methodology

## Visualization only
- [Network Graph](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/pvalyou/ise-data@main/snapshot/network.json): graph layout geometry, not a fact table
- [Similarity Map](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/pvalyou/ise-data@main/snapshot/embedding-map.json): map coordinates and clusters, not a fact table
